channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Lebanese Journalist Killed in Israeli Airstrike Near Israel-Lebanon Border
item.description: A Lebanese journalist, Amal Khalil, was killed in an Israeli airstrike on April 22, 2026, while working near the Israeli-Lebanese border. Khalil, a veteran correspondent for Al-Akhbar, was in the town...

item.title: Exploitation of women in international cyber‑scam networks affecting Australians
item.description: A recent report by the Australian Institute of Criminology has uncovered the disturbing exploitation of women in international cyber‑scam operations that target Australians. Victims, often young women...

item.title: Pakistan plans major power expansion to meet future demand and reduce reliance on imported fuels by 2035
item.description: Pakistan’s government has projected that the country will require between 62,660MW and 70,720MW of additional power generation capacity by 2035 to sustain economic growth ranging from around 3.5% to 6...

item.title: Canada Post to maintain home mail delivery for rural addresses
item.description: Canada Post has confirmed that residents in rural areas with individual roadside mailboxes will continue to receive home mail delivery for the foreseeable future. This announcement comes as the Crown ...

item.title: Why Studying History Matters: Understanding the Past to Comprehend the Present
item.description: The article explores the question of why studying history is valuable, arguing against the notion that knowledge should only be pursued for practical utility or social advancement. The author critique...

item.title: FIA Implements New SOPs to Expedite Money Laundering Investigations
item.description: ISLAMABAD: The Federal Investigation Agency (FIA) has approved new standard operating procedures (SOPs) aimed at expediting money laundering investigations across Pakistan. According to sources, the S...

item.title: IPC Trains Ekiti Journalists on Best Practices for 2026 Election Reporting
item.description: Ahead of the 2026 gubernatorial elections in Ekiti State, the International Press Council (IPC) organized a two-day training for journalists, aimed at enhancing their election coverage skills. The eve...

item.title: Safaricom Restores Popular Features and Improves MyOneApp Following User Feedback
item.description: Safaricom has rolled out a significant update to its MyOneApp, launching version 5.1.5 on the Google Play Store. This move comes after a wave of complaints from customers over the app's earlier versio...

item.title: Religious Leaders Guide Youth on Peace and Justice After Election Violence
item.description: After election wahala in Tanzania during October 2025, many young people dey shaken and scared because of violence wey cause loss of lives. To help youth find balance, religious leaders from different...

item.title: Ramaphosa suspends national police commissioner Masemola amid PFMA charges, Dimpane appointed as acting commissioner
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa has placed national police commissioner Fannie Masemola on precautionary suspension due to serious charges under the Public Finance Management Act (PFMA). Masemola faces four...

item.title: Eight people killed and two injured after vehicle falls into gorge in Chamba, Tehri district
item.description: Based on the available information from the provided link text, a serious road accident has taken place in the Tehri district of Uttarakhand, India. A vehicle reportedly lost control and fell into a d...

item.title: US-Iran Talks Expected to Resume Soon Amid Tensions in the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The US President, Donald Trump, has expressed optimism regarding the continuation of talks with Iran within the next few days, despite ongoing tensions in the Strait of Hormuz. While there has been an...

item.title: Trump amplifies commentator’s remarks on birthright citizenship debate, drawing criticism over reference to India
item.description: United States President Donald Trump recently shared remarks by political commentator Michael Savage on social media, reigniting debate around birthright citizenship in the US and triggering controver...

item.title: Adebayo Adelabu resigns as Nigeria’s Power Minister to pursue Oyo governorship bid amid ongoing power crisis
item.description: Adebayo Adelabu, wey serve as Nigeria Minister of Power for about three years, don resign from him position on April 22, 2026. Him submit resignation letter to President Bola Tinubu, thanking am for t...

item.title: U.S. administration lowers federal classification of state-licensed medical marijuana
item.description: In a significant policy change, former U.S. President Donald Trump announced the federal reclassification of medical marijuana that is legally licensed at the state level. This shift downgrades the dr...

item.title: INEC to display voters register nationwide from April 29 to May 5 for claims and objections
item.description: Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) don finish the second phase of its Continuous Voter Registration (CVR) exercise nationwide, wit total of 3,748,704 completed registrations recorded acr...

item.title: Violence Erupts in Durban During Local Protest Against Immigrants
item.description: In Durban, South Africa, protests against immigrants turned violent earlier this week, leading to the closure of many businesses owned by foreign nationals. The protest, which started as a mass cleanu...

item.title: Kenya and Uganda Plan Regional Oil Refinery in Tanzania
item.description: Kenya and Uganda are exploring plans to establish a joint oil refinery in Tanga, Tanzania, with the aim of tapping the East African region's crude oil resources and boosting energy security. President...

item.title: Air Transat Reduces Flights Amid Rising Jet Fuel Costs
item.description: Air Transat has announced a reduction in its flight schedule due to soaring jet fuel prices triggered by the ongoing conflict in the Middle East. The airline will suspend six per cent of its flights b...

item.title: Creamline wins 11th PVL title after defeating Cignal in All-Filipino finals
item.description: Nagbalik sa tuktok ang Creamline Cool Smashers matapos makuha ang kanilang ika-11 kampeonato sa Premier Volleyball League (PVL) sa pamamagitan ng panalo kontra Cignal Super Spikers sa 2026 All-Filipin...
